events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: brake hose twisted on assembly floor, rough-complete. Brakes scope. Need assess compliance. Twisted brake hose is non-compliant/defective. It can cause fatigue, flow restriction, failure. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? In manufacturing quality gate, twisted hose is a defect that if shipped could lead to brake failure. FMVSS/OEM require hoses not twisted, no kinks, proper routing. Risk high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 70. Confidence 0.95. Findings: brake hose installed with twist, violates routing/assembly specs, potential flow restriction and fatigue. Actions: remove/reposition hose, inspect for damage, replace if necessary, re-torque fittings, verify routing and twist-free, re-test/inspect. Rationale. References: FMVSS 106 (brake hoses), OEM assembly specs, SAE J1401 maybe. Need output only JSON. Ensure valid JSON.

    "Brake hose is installed with a twist, violating proper routing requirements.",
    "Twisted hose can restrict brake fluid flow and cause premature fatigue or failure.",
    "Condition is non-conforming to OEM assembly and FMVSS-adjacent brake hose practice."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove or loosen hose fittings and reposition the hose twist-free per routing spec.",
    "Inspect hose, fittings, and mating surfaces for damage or deformation; replace hose if damaged.",
    "Re-torque fittings to OEM specification and verify correct orientation and clearance.",
    "Re-inspect at the quality gate and functionally verify the brake system before acceptance."
  ],
  "rationale": "A twisted brake hose is an installed defect that fails OEM routing and FMVSS-adjacent brake hose requirements because it can restrict fluid flow and lead to fatigue failure. The assembly must be corrected before close-out.",
  "references": [
    "FMVSS 106 / brake hose performance and installation requirements",
    "OEM brake hose routing and assembly specifications",
    "SAE J1401 hydraulic brake hose assembly practice"
  ]
}
